pages.title: about
pages.text: 简单的记录一下自己开发过程中遇到的一些问题，学习一下如何使用GitPage做这些记录。 Github主页链接：https://github.com/HangX-Ma 当前开源项目： eleRobotJPS - 使用JPS算法进行六轴机械臂的避障路径规划任务，使用TOPP-RA进行轨迹规划，但目前TOPP-RA部分遇到了一些问题，规划出的轨迹和原路径偏移较大，暂未解决。 MiniScpoe - 一个小型的示波器项目，借鉴了其他人的工程并做了一些改进，用STC8A8K64D4芯片完成，主要用于个人的嵌入式学习。 Fuzzy Logic Controller - 算是对智能控制技术的一项实践，对传统的PD型模糊控制器进行了改进。可以作为一个C++的小型库使用，也上传了模糊控制的学习文件。 miniFOC - 工程文件借鉴于ZhuYanzhen1/miniFOC，源工程的编译结构看着太不爽了，顺带学习一下GNU工具链，重构了CMake以及工程结构，并对.ld以及.s原理进行阐述。后续学习FOC的编程控制并尝试改进。

posts.title: HEXO Modules Renderer
posts.text: Funny Title When a user clicks on another page when visiting your blog, we can prank the title of the page and call the user back. Firstly create a new FunnyTitle.js under \themes\material-x\source\js category, in which to fill in the following code: 12345678910111213141516var OriginTitle = document.title;var titleTime;document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', function () { if (document.hidden) { $('[rel="icon"]').attr('href', "/funny.ico"); document.title = '╭(°A°`)╮ 页面崩溃啦 ~'; clearTimeout(titleTime); } else { $('[rel="icon"]').attr('href', "/favicon.ico"); document.title = '(ฅ>ω<*ฅ) 噫又好啦 ~' + OriginTitle; titleTime = setTimeout(function () { document.title = OriginTitle; }, 2000); }}); funny.ico is the icon for your site after the user switches to another tab. funny.ico is the normal icon. Afterwards, add the following code in \themes\material-x\layout\layout.pug. 12<!--浏览器搞笑标题--><script type="text/javascript" src="/js/FunnyTitle.js"></script>

posts.title: STC8A Development Records
posts.text: MiniScope based on STC8A Last year I noticed a project named MiniScope on Bilibili video platform. It really attracted me on account of its low cost and relatively simple engineering difficulties. I want to record my development process because I haven’t built and complete an embedded project on my own. This development record will help me understand the STC8Ax chip and other fundamental modules on embedded system. Introduction I think this post should serve as an outline. Therefore, no details will be shown in this post but development timeline or brief summary of some problem I met. But I think, at initial stage, simple records about the tips or somewhere needs to pay attention to is necessary. I will reorganize this post when it looks a bit mess. 2022-06-01 Data Truncation In STC8A chip, data can not be declared to double or float There exist two scenario in which the data truncation occurs. In ADC conversion, accurate reference voltage is important. STC8A calibrates the internal reference level and stores the result in RAM. In STC8A8K64S4A12, we can locates this value in RAM address 0xEF(High Byte) and 0xF0(Low Byte). The following formula indicates a way to use the REFV in RAM calibrating the VCC in embedded system. ADCRAMBandGapADCBandGapSampled/4096=ADCCalibratedVoltageADCSampledVoltage/4096×Resistance_Divider_Coefficient\frac{ADC_{RAMBandGap}}{ADC_{BandGapSampled}/4096} = \frac{ADC_{CalibratedVoltage}}{ADC_{SampledVoltage}/4096} \times Resistance\_Divider\_Coefficient ADCBandGapSampled​/4096ADCRAMBandGap​​=ADCSampledVoltage​/4096ADCCalibratedVoltage​​×Resistance_Divider_Coefficient Take care the (uint32_t) forced type conversion and the division process locating at the tail. In STC8A all variables are integers so I initially expand ratio to one hundred times. unit16_t type multiplication process may result in data overflow, so (uint32_t) conversion is necessary. Do not use () to imitate the math formula above. For instance, (ratio/100) if ratio=590, the result will be 5 other than you imaged effect as 5.9. So I give multiplication process higher priority and abandon the () in calculation. 1234uint16_t ADC_Sampled_Bandgap, *ADC_RAM_Bandgap, ADC_CHx_Val;uint16_t Vin;Vin = (uint32_t)(*ADC_RAM_Bandgap) * ADC_CHx_Val * ratio /100 /ADC_Sampled_Bandgap; MiniScope Repository: Open-ELL/MiniDSO-Pro

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick Start Create a new post 1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server 1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files 1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites 1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment

posts.title: HEXO Math Formula Renderer
posts.text: By default, LaTeX\LaTeXLATE​X formulas are not rendered and KaTeX\KaTeXKATE​X cannot be correctly displayed. To fix this, the first step is to uninstall the default renderer and install renderer. I find the following way can solve my problem rather than those using hexo-renderer-kramed or hexo-renderer-pandoc. KaTeX\KaTeXKATE​X renderer is recommended rather than mathjax\mathnormal{mathjax}mathjax because mathjax\mathnormal{mathjax}mathjax always escapes \\ to \ and cannot wrap lines. 1. Change Markdown Renderer If you have install the mathjax\mathrm{mathjax}mathjax, uninstall it at first step. 1npm uninstall hexo-renderer-kramed --save Install katex\mathrm{katex}katex. 1npm i hexo-renderer-markdown-it-plus --save hexo−math\mathrm{hexo-math}hexo−math will give you a better visual experience. 1npm install hexo-math --save 2. Setting Configuration File Modify the site configuration file (_config.yml) at Home page and add hexo-math plug-in, directly to the end of the text to add the following information. 123456789math:engine: katexkatex: css: https://fastly.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.10.0/dist/katex.min.css js: https://fastly.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.10.0/dist/katex.min.js config: # KaTeX config throwOnError: false errorColor: "#cc0000" Add the following configuration code at the end of the text of _config.yml in themes/your_themes. 12345post:math: enable: true specific: true engine: katex NOTE: specific means conversion is enabled only when math: True is added to Front-matter to speed up loading when the formula is not included. Finally, 1hexo clean && hexo generate Reference: Link1 Link2
